name: Chick Pea Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and soak the dried chick peas overnight in water to cover. The next day, rinse and drain the peas.
2. In a 4-quart saucepan, bring 6 cups of water to a boil. Add the soaked chick peas.
3. Remove any froth that forms on the surface. Add the sliced onions and olive oil.
4. Simmer until the chick peas are tender, about one to two hours. If needed, add hot water (not cold) to make more stock.
5. At the end, add salt to taste.
6. Serve hot with lemon juice or vinegar.
Makes six servings.
Nutritional analysis per serving: 80 calories, 3 grams protein, 2 grams fat, 12 grams carbohydrates.
